questions.question: Describe the key differences between the Waterfall and Agile software development methodologies. (8 marks)
A project's scope statement outlines its deliverables, timelines, and budget. What is the primary purpose of a scope statement in project management? (5 marks)
Explain the concept of Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) and its importance in project management. Provide an example of a WBS. (10 marks)
